title: Safari Adventure Coloring
description: A fun coloring activity featuring simple outlines of safari animals to help young children learn about wildlife while developing fine motor skills.
instructions: Color the safari animals using crayons, colored pencils, or markers. Try to use colors that match what these animals look like in real life!

content.image: A simple scene with five safari animals: a lion with a mane, a tall giraffe with spots, an elephant with big ears and trunk, a zebra with stripes, and a monkey hanging from a tree branch. All animals are drawn with simple black outlines on white background.
learningFacts: Lions live in groups called prides
Giraffes can be up to 18 feet tall
Elephants use their trunks to grab food and drink water
No two zebras have exactly the same pattern of stripes
Monkeys use their tails to help them balance in trees
